case_title: U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. DANIEL E KENNEDY ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KENNEDY, DANIEL E $4,267.27 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,267.27, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 64828531)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-28-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-03-2020 CONTINUED TO JUL-28-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 64669779), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION SERVED JAN-18-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KENNEDY, DANIEL E

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $38.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 64828531) AS TO DEFENDANT KENNEDY, DANIEL E
